name: Cartesia API
description: Cartesia provides ultra-fast, realistic voice AI APIs including text-to-speech (TTS) with the Sonic model family and speech-to-text (STT) with the Ink model family. Supports byte and server-sent event streaming output formats for TTS, and file-based transcription for STT.
